message:
Fix missing order_by field in AggColumn initializers

Add order_by: Vec::new() to all AggColumn struct initialization sites
that were missed when the order_by field was added to the struct.
Fixes compile error in HAVING clause handler and parser function call.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

                 0,
                 arg_base,
                 reg,
-                P4::FuncName("json_extract".to_owned()),
+                P4::FuncName("JSON_EXTRACT".to_owned()),
                 2,
             );
         }
